text.title: Ads Budget Optimization Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Ads Budget Optimization. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Campaign cut on day 2 due to high CPA; identical campaign re-launched day 8 wins.
antipattern.fix: Hold all cuts until day 7 OR sample-size; document early-signal as 'noise' in ops log.

antipattern.symptom: Winning campaign budget doubled; smart bidding collapses for 7 days; CPA spikes.
antipattern.fix: Cap weekly step at 20%; ramp over 3-4 weeks for doubling target.

antipattern.symptom: 100% budget in scaling winners; 6 months later all creatives fatigued; CTR collapses across account.
antipattern.fix: Reinstate 10% test reserve; commit to >=1 test per cycle.
